summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of EMORVIA rebrand. All 14 backend pytest tests pass (health, OTP send/verify with bypass + live MessageCentral, admin login/billing GET/PUT, public billing without packages, admin providers CRUD with perMinRate & sharePctOverride incl. null clear, provider login + PATCH /provider/me, public providers list, /call/log per-minute amount = ceil(durationSec/60)*perMinRate=80 for 120s @ ₹40/min). All targeted frontend flows verified end-to-end: EMORVIA dark theme welcome page, OTP-based registration with bypass account creates user and navigates to /app, admin login, /admin/payments new Global Payout Split slider (saved 65/35 correctly with toast confirmation, no packages UI), /admin/providers new 'Rate / Share' column showing ₹/min and edit dialog with PER-MIN RATE + PAYOUT SHARE OVERRIDE fields, privacy policy link points to https://emorvia.in/privacy-policy/.

issues: UPI NAME defaults to seeded value 'Bongo Bandhu' (legacy seed) — admin can edit it, but ideally seed should be 'EMORVIA' to match rebrand.

action_items: (Optional/cosmetic) Update seeded UPI Name default from 'Bongo Bandhu' to 'EMORVIA' in /app/node-backend/server.js seed routine so fresh installs match the new brand.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/node-backend/server.js is 2063 lines — exceeds the >700 line guideline; consider splitting into routers (auth, admin, provider, calls, billing, uploads).
PATCH /api/admin/providers does not return 404 for unknown id (findByIdAndUpdate returns null and the endpoint sends 200 with null body). Add not-found handling.

Public OTP send endpoint has no per-mobile rate-limit / cooldown visible in tested path — risk of SMS abuse via MessageCentral. Recommend a per-mobile 30–60s cooldown + IP-based throttle, and verifying the bypass list short-circuits before calling MessageCentral (already true for bypass mobiles, good).
Welcome bonus seeding logic should be idempotent (verify that re-calling /auth/otp/verify for an existing user does not re-grant ₹50 bonus).
MessageCentral credentials embedded in /app/node-backend/.env — confirm .env is git-ignored and not shipped to client builds (it is server-side, so OK, but worth a code-review note).
test_credentials: Admin: admindash / Admin#2026* | User bypass OTP: 7777777777 / 2411 | Provider password: 8000000001 / pro123 | MessageCentral live: 8240915631 (send-only)
seed_data_creation: During /call/log test the test user 7777777777 was credited with ₹1000 via /api/admin/users/:id/adjust and then charged ₹80 for a 120s call with Aarav Mehta (provider perMinRate temporarily set to ₹40, restored to ₹40 at end). Aarav Mehta perMinRate is now 40 (was changed by tests). Global providerSharePct is restored to original value after test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All EMORVIA rebrand acceptance criteria verified. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_emorvia_backend.py is the regression suite for future iterations — run with `pytest backend/tests/test_emorvia_backend.py -v`. Note: tests bump Aarav Mehta perMinRate to 40 and toggle sharePctOverride; they are idempotent and restore state where possible. MessageCentral live send test (8240915631) does consume one real SMS per run — comment it out if you don't want to burn credits.
rca of the issue: N/A — no defects found in the changes under review.
